creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Support for RTL8105 was already implemented in both stable/8 and 
stable/7. 

Thanks for confirmation. Actuallt the ukphy(4) may not be the right 
PHY driver so you may need to apply additional patch made in 
r217910. But I guess it wouldn't be big problem for most cases. 
Thanks.
